title: MTU Class of 2026 Celebrates Spring Commencement
summary_en: Michigan Technological University will honor students graduating this spring with two ceremonies held at the Student Development Complex's John J. MacInnes Student Ice Arena.  The Graduate Student Commencement Ceremony will take place at 3 p.m. Friday, April 24, followed by  . . .
title_cn: 密歇根理工大学2026届学生庆祝春季毕业典礼
